DR_Segmentation_UNet_DeepLabV3.description: Comparative study of U-Net vs DeepLabV3+ for segmenting Diabetic Retinopathy lesions on fundus images. GPU-accelerated training with PyTorch and CUDA.

HandGestureSystem.display_name: Hand Gesture Recognition for IoT Control
HandGestureSystem.description: Real-time hand sign recognition using MobileNetV2 for edge devices. Translates gestures into IoT commands with low latency — optimized for deployment on resource-constrained hardware.

StuntingApp.description: A web-based stunting detection app built for Desa Panyingkiran, designed to run on low-end devices for maximum accessibility.

Receipt-Inator.description: Split restaurant bills from receipt photos — snap a pic, auto-extract items with DeepSeek Vision + Tesseract OCR, assign to friends, and see who owes what.

MobAppOTP.description: A mobile app testing cloud-based OTP token authentication using Firebase. Built with Flutter and Dart.

Boolean-Retriaval-System.description: Information retrieval engine supporting boolean queries (AND, OR, NOT) over a news article corpus. Built with NLTK for text processing and Pandas for inverted index construction.

Genetic-Algorithm-Regression-Model.description: A regression model analyzing CS:GO weapon skin market trends on Steam. The same genetic algorithm approach also applies to stock market forecasting.

MultiDiseaseClassification_ML.description: A machine learning model for classifying multiple diseases based on their risk factors. A comparative study of SVM vs Random Forest on a Kaggle medical dataset.

Covid-19-Dasboard-App.description: A web dashboard visualizing COVID-19 pandemic data including mortality rates, survival rates, and case trends.

QuizzAppScalable.description: A web quiz app testing Redis scalability by emulating concurrent user sessions with token-based authentication.
